skill.name: planner
skill.description: Create comprehensive, phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks. Use when user says: "make a plan", "create a plan", "plan this out", "plan the implementation", "help me plan", "design a plan", "draft a plan", "write a plan", "outline the steps", "break this down into tasks", "what's the plan for", or any similar planning request. Also triggers on explicit "/planner" or "/plan" commands.
skill.summary: Create detailed implementation plans with sprints, atomic tasks, and validation checklists
skill.author: am-will

security_audit.summary: All static findings are false positives. The skill is a legitimate planning tool that creates implementation plans with sprints and tasks. Detected patterns refer to markdown formatting (backticks for file names), not actual code execution. No security concerns identified.

content.value_statement: This skill helps AI agents create detailed, phased implementation plans with atomic tasks and validation checklists. It breaks down complex tasks into manageable sprints for better project management.
actual_capabilities: Creates phased implementation plans with sprints and atomic tasks
Asks clarifying questions to narrow requirements before planning
Retrieves relevant documentation using Context7 skill
Saves plans as markdown files with standardized naming
Identifies potential gotchas and risks in implementation plans
Includes demo, validation, and rollback sections in each plan
limitations: Does not execute the plan - only creates documentation
Relies on user input for requirements clarification
May need manual review for complex multi-team projects
External documentation retrieval depends on Context7 skill availability

use_cases.title: Feature Implementation Planning
use_cases.description: Break down a new feature request into manageable sprints and tasks with clear acceptance criteria

use_cases.title: Bug Fix Roadmapping
use_cases.description: Create a structured plan for investigating and fixing bugs with step-by-step tasks and validation

use_cases.title: Complex Task Decomposition
use_cases.description: Break down any complex task into atomic, committable pieces that can be parallelized

prompt_templates.title: Simple Plan Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a plan for [describe your task or feature]
prompt_templates.scenario: Basic planning when you have a clear task

prompt_templates.title: Feature Planning
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to add [feature name] to my [project/application]. Please create a detailed implementation plan with sprints and tasks.
prompt_templates.scenario: Planning a new feature with context about the project

prompt_templates.title: Bug Fix Planning
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a plan to fix [describe the bug]. The issue is [symptoms], and I've tried [what you already attempted].
prompt_templates.description: Planning a bug fix with known context

prompt_templates.title: Complex Project Planning
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to [describe high-level goal]. This involves [list components or areas]. Please create a comprehensive plan with multiple sprints.

output_examples.input: Create a plan to add user authentication to my React app
output_examples.output:
Plan: User Authentication

Sprint 1: Setup & Configuration
- Task 1.1: Install authentication packages
- Task 1.2: Configure environment variables

Sprint 2: Backend Implementation
- Task 2.1: Create user model
- Task 2.2: Implement registration endpoint
- Task 2.3: Implement login endpoint

Demo/Validation: Test login flow end-to-end

output_examples.input: Plan fixing the login bug where users get logged out after 5 minutes
output_examples.output:
Plan: Login Session Fix

Sprint 1: Investigation
- Task 1.1: Review session configuration
- Task 1.2: Check token expiration settings

Sprint 2: Implementation
- Task 2.1: Extend session timeout
- Task 2.2: Add refresh token logic

Gotchas: Consider mobile app compatibility

best_practices: Provide as much context as possible about your project and requirements
Answer clarifying questions thoroughly to get a better plan
Review the gotchas section and address them before implementation
anti_patterns: Asking for a plan without any context about the project
Ignoring the clarification phase - answer questions proactively
Trying to skip to implementation without a clear plan

faq.question: Does this skill actually implement the plan?
faq.answer: No, this skill only creates the plan document. It helps you plan but does not execute any tasks.

faq.question: What triggers this skill?
faq.answer: Use phrases like "make a plan", "create a plan", or use the /planner or /plan commands.

faq.question: How detailed are the plans?
faq.answer: Plans include sprints, atomic tasks, file locations, dependencies, acceptance criteria, and validation methods.

faq.question: Can I customize the plan format?
faq.answer: The skill uses a structured template. You can modify the output after the plan is generated.

faq.question: What if I do not know the answers to the clarifying questions?
faq.answer: Provide as much information as you can. The skill will work with partial information and note gaps as risks.

faq.question: Does this work with any programming language?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill is language-agnostic. It creates plans based on your requirements and the documentation it retrieves.
